series_metadata.series_description: File consists of applications for public water system modifications or construction plan approvals. Includes specifications, written descriptions, blueprints, and copy of final approval letter from Director.

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Retain copy in office until updated obsolete or superseded, then destroy. Transfer original to State Archives Microfilm Vaul ; Paper: Retain in office for 60 days after issuance or formal director's action or until any appeals are resolved. Microfilm blueprints only; destroy blueprints and all other documents after microfilm has been checked for quality and completeness, Microform: Archives ; Paper: Wastepaper
